principles: 先完成 vertical slice，再做横向扩展
先完成采购穿行 MVP，再做 RAG / Agent / Evaluation
Human Review 优先于自动结论
证据链优先于漂亮 UI
不在 tracker 里的功能默认不开发
mvp_boundary: MVP 只交付采购穿行 vertical slice
MVP 不实现完整 RAG 四库
MVP 不实现完整 Evaluation Center
MVP 不实现完整 Bad Case Center UI
MVP 不实现完整 Agent Workflow
MVP 不实现销售、函证、访谈、合同审核扩展场景
MVP 允许保留证据索引、规则 evidence、基础测试、demo data、Provider 接口和后续扩展接口
不得在 Phase 10 完成前开发 Post-MVP 功能
user_field_policy: MVP 阶段不实现完整 RBAC
MVP 阶段所有 user 相关字段使用 nullable UUID、nullable string 或 actor_name 记录操作者，不强制 FK 到 users
Phase 19 实现 users / roles / user_roles 后，再评估是否回填真实外键
在 Phase 19 前，不允许为了 owner_id / uploaded_by / reviewed_by 等字段提前实现完整认证系统

Docker Desktop started; docker compose config passed; PostgreSQL container startup verified; pg_isready returned accepting connections; select 1 query succeeded; container status healthy.

tasks.title: 实现 Task Center 和上传组件

tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 1 task and document upload implementation.

tasks.title: 实现 task 和 document API
tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 1 task and document upload implementation.

tasks.title: 添加任务和文件上传 API 测试

acceptance_criteria: 可创建 procurement 任务
可上传六类采购文件
文件保存到 local_storage/uploads
documents 记录包含 hash 和 storage_path
phases.notes: Phase 1 completed: TaskService task CRUD, DocumentService upload validation/hash/storage, audit_tasks/documents migration, task/document APIs, Task Center UI, and API tests. Phase 2 OCR and later modules were not implemented.

phases.name: OCR / 文档解析 / 页级文本保存

tasks.title: 展示 OCR 状态和页级 raw_text
tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 2 document parsing and pages implementation.

tasks.title: 创建 document_pages 表
tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 2 document parsing and pages implementation.

tasks.title: 实现 OCR 和 pages API
tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 2 document parsing and pages implementation.

tasks.title: 测试 PDF 样例页级解析
tasks.notes: Completed in Phase 2 document parsing and pages implementation.

acceptance_criteria: 每份文档可生成 document_pages
每页包含 page_number、raw_text、ocr_blocks
OCR 失败可记录错误状态
分类服务可读取页级文本
phases.notes: Phase 2 completed: document_pages migration, text PDF page parsing with PyMuPDF, Basic OCR Provider boundary for images, OCR status/error recording, OCR/pages APIs, Task Center page text viewer, and OCR API tests. Phase 3 classification and later modules were not implemented.

phases.name: 文档分类
deliverables: document type display and correction UI

tasks.title: 实现六类采购文档分类
tasks.notes: Implemented rule keyword + filename ClassificationService for six procurement document types and unknown handling.

tasks.title: 展示 doc_type、置信度和分类理由
tasks.notes: Task Center shows doc_type, confidence, reason, low-confidence review marker, alternatives, and manual correction form.

tasks.title: 使用 documents 分类字段保存结果
tasks.notes: Added documents classification fields for confidence, reason, alternative_types, and original_classification while reusing doc_type/review_status.

tasks.title: 实现 classify API 和人工修正入口
tasks.notes: Implemented POST /api/v1/documents/{document_id}/classify and PATCH /api/v1/documents/{document_id} for manual doc_type correction.

tasks.title: 添加六类采购样例分类测试
tasks.notes: Added classification API tests for six types, low confidence, manual correction, original reason preservation, and un-OCRed rejection.

acceptance_criteria: 六类采购文件可被分类
分类结果包含 doc_type、confidence、reason
低置信度进入复核标记
人工修正不覆盖原始分类理由
phases.notes: Phase 3 completed: implemented heuristic ClassificationService using OCR page text and filename, six procurement doc_type labels plus unknown, low-confidence need_review marking, manual doc_type correction with original_classification preservation, classification API, Task Center display/correction UI, and classification API tests. Phase 4 extraction and Post-MVP classification expansion were not implemented.

phases.name: 字段抽取与 Schema 校验

tasks.title: 实现 ExtractionService 和六类文档 Schema
tasks.notes: Implemented ExtractionService, six procurement document schema specs, Pydantic validation, null + warning missing-field behavior, and basic normalizers.

tasks.title: 实现字段表、置信度和来源展示
tasks.notes: Task Center now provides Extract action and read-only field table with confidence, source page/source text, missing, low-confidence, and warning markers.

tasks.title: 创建 extracted_fields 表
tasks.notes: Added extracted_fields table with required metadata, normalized JSON, source evidence fields, nullable corrected_by/corrected_at, and no users FK.

tasks.title: 实现 extract 和 fields API
tasks.notes: Implemented POST /api/v1/documents/{document_id}/extract, GET /api/v1/documents/{document_id}/fields, and GET /api/v1/tasks/{task_id}/fields.

tasks.title: 添加 Schema 校验、缺字段和标准化测试
tasks.notes: Added extraction tests for schema completeness, Pydantic validation, missing fields, date/amount normalization, line_items, invalid provider JSON, and fields APIs.

acceptance_criteria: 六类采购文档都有 MVP 字段列表
每个字段可追溯到页码和来源片段
缺失字段输出 null 和 warning
抽取结果可被 Rule Engine 读取
phases.notes: Phase 4 completed: implemented extracted_fields migration, six procurement MVP schemas, regex/heuristic ExtractionService, basic date/amount/tax-rate/name normalization, missing-field null + warning behavior, basic line_items structure, extract/fields APIs, Task Center field table, and extraction tests. Phase 5 business aggregation, Phase 6 rule judgment, Phase 8 field correction, and Post-MVP features were not implemented.

phases.name: 采购业务归集

tasks.title: 实现 LinkageService 和 business_key 生成
tasks.notes: Implemented LinkageService with stable CONTRACT/INVOICE/TASK group business_key generation and low-confidence need_review marking.

tasks.title: 展示业务链路和低置信度归集
tasks.notes: Task Center now shows business_key, Link Documents action, read-only document relations, confidence, low-confidence marker, and evidence.

tasks.title: 创建 document_relations 表
tasks.notes: Added documents.business_key and document_relations table with relation_type, confidence, and evidence JSONB.

tasks.title: 实现 link-documents API
tasks.notes: Implemented POST /api/v1/tasks/{task_id}/link-documents and GET /api/v1/tasks/{task_id}/document-relations.

tasks.title: 添加合同号、一对多和低置信度归集测试
tasks.notes: Added linkage tests for contract number grouping, invoice/payment purpose grouping, low-confidence fallback, one-to-many payments, relation writes, and missing-field warning.

acceptance_criteria: 能生成 business_key
能生成 document_relations
归集证据可查看
低置信度归集不自动通过
phases.notes: Phase 5 completed: implemented LinkageService, documents.business_key, document_relations migration, task-scoped document linkage APIs, Task Center relation display, explicit contract/invoice linkage, payment purpose and voucher summary assisted linkage, supplier/date/amount low-confidence fallback, need_review marking for low-confidence groups, and linkage API tests. Phase 6 Rule Engine, Review Center, complex graph matching, cross-task linkage, and manual relation editing were not implemented.

phases.name: Rule Engine MVP

tasks.title: 实现 RuleContext、RuleResult 和 rule registry
tasks.notes: Implemented RuleEngineService with RuleContext, RuleResult, EvidenceRef, and deterministic Python rule registry.

tasks.title: 实现六条采购 MVP 规则
tasks.notes: Implemented PROC_MISSING_001, PROC_TIME_001, PROC_AMOUNT_001, PROC_NAME_001, PROC_QTY_001, and PROC_TAX_001 without LLM pass/fail judgment.

tasks.title: 展示规则结果、expected、actual 和 evidence
tasks.notes: Task Center now runs audit rules and shows read-only rule_code, status, severity, message, expected_value, actual_value, evidence, and review marker.

tasks.title: 创建 audit_rules 和 audit_results 表
tasks.notes: Added audit_rules and audit_results tables, six seed rules, enabled/version/parameters support, and nullable reviewed_by.

tasks.title: 实现 audit、audit-results 和 rules API
tasks.notes: Implemented POST /api/v1/tasks/{task_id}/audit, GET /api/v1/tasks/{task_id}/audit-results, GET /api/v1/audit-results/{result_id}, and GET /api/v1/rules.

tasks.title: 为每条规则添加 pass、fail、need_review 测试
tasks.notes: Added rule engine API tests covering six-rule pass, non-pass/need_review, missing fields not passing, evidence, many invoices/payments, low-confidence warning, rules API, result list, and result detail.

acceptance_criteria: 六条 MVP 规则可执行
规则输出包含完整 RuleResult 字段
缺字段输出 need_review
高风险 fail 进入 Review Center
规则单测可运行
phases.notes: Phase 6 completed: implemented deterministic RuleEngineService, RuleContext, RuleResult, EvidenceRef, Python rule registry, six procurement MVP rules, audit_rules/audit_results migration with six seeded rules, audit/rules APIs, Task Center read-only rule results, and tests for pass/non-pass, missing fields, evidence, many invoices/payments, and low-confidence warning. Phase 7 Audit Workbench, Phase 8 Review Center, Phase 12 Rule Center, RAG, Agent, and LLM pass/fail judgment were not implemented.
scope_notes: MVP 中 PROC_QTY_001 只覆盖基础 line_items 数量一致性
MVP 中 PROC_TAX_001 只覆盖基础税率、税额、含税/不含税口径校验
完整品种一致性、复杂多品种逐行匹配、单位换算、item_key 标准化和复杂品种映射后置到 Post-MVP Rule Center / 规则增强阶段
MVP 不新增独立 PROC_ITEM_001，除非 Phase 6 完成后仍有明确时间

phases.name: Audit Workbench 前端工作台

tasks.title: 提供工作台聚合数据查询
tasks.notes: Reused existing read APIs for documents, pages, task fields, and audit results; no new mutable backend workflow was introduced.

tasks.title: 实现左文档、中证据、右字段和规则的三栏工作台
tasks.notes: Implemented AuditWorkbenchPage with left document list, middle OCR text viewer, right field table and rule result table, empty/loading/error states, and Task Center entry.

tasks.title: 校验证据定位字段满足工作台展示
tasks.notes: Verified existing documents.business_key, extracted_fields.source_page/source_text, and audit_results.evidence are sufficient for Phase 7 evidence navigation; no migration added.

tasks.title: 复用或实现 workbench 聚合 API
tasks.notes: Added frontend client wrapper for GET /api/v1/tasks/{task_id}/fields and reused existing pages/audit-results/documents endpoints; no /workbench endpoint was needed.

tasks.title: 验证异常点击能定位证据片段
tasks.notes: Validated with backend pytest, frontend production build, docker compose config, and JSON validation; evidence jumps are implemented through field source refs and rule evidence refs.

acceptance_criteria: 用户可在一个页面查看文档、字段、规则结果
异常可以定位到来源文档和页级文本
不依赖完整 bbox 高亮也能完成复核
页面能支撑 MVP 演示
phases.notes: Phase 7 completed a read-only Audit Workbench using existing Phase 1-6 APIs: task documents, document pages, task fields, and audit results. Implemented three-column document/OCR/fields-and-rules UI, field source_text navigation, rule evidence navigation via matched extracted_fields, Task Center entry, and a read-only ReviewDrawer placeholder. No new database table, schema migration, rule logic, Review Center action, field correction, exception confirmation/rejection, or rule rerun was added.

phases.name: Review Center 基础复核闭环

tasks.title: 实现 ReviewService 字段修正、确认、驳回、重跑
tasks.notes: Implemented ReviewService for review queue, field correction, confirm, dismiss, rerun, comments, and audit log writes.

tasks.title: 实现复核队列和复核操作 UI
tasks.notes: Implemented Review Center queue UI, field correction drawer, confirm/dismiss/rerun buttons, comment history, and Audit Workbench ReviewDrawer review actions.

tasks.title: 创建 review_comments 和 audit_logs 表
tasks.notes: Added 0007 migration and models for review_comments and audit_logs; reused audit_results.review_status and extracted_fields verification metadata without users/RBAC tables.

tasks.title: 实现 review、field correction、confirm、dismiss、rerun API
tasks.notes: Implemented GET /review/queue, GET/POST /review/comments, PATCH /fields/{field_id}, confirm/dismiss/rerun audit result endpoints.

tasks.title: 测试 before/after、驳回原因、重跑规则和 audit_logs
tasks.notes: Added review API tests for queue, comments, before/after field correction, source evidence preservation, dismiss reason validation, confirm, high-risk pending behavior, rerun, and audit_logs.

acceptance_criteria: 异常结果能进入复核队列
字段修正不覆盖原始证据
确认和驳回异常可记录
字段修正后可重跑规则
复核动作可审计
phases.notes: Phase 8 completed ReviewService, review_comments and audit_logs migration, review queue, field correction with before/after audit trail, source_page/source_text/source_bbox preservation, audit result confirm/dismiss with required dismiss reason, rerun through existing RuleEngineService.run_audit, review comments create/list APIs, Review Center UI, comment history, and Audit Workbench ReviewDrawer real review actions. No Phase 9 report export, complete Bad Case Center, complete RBAC, RAG, Agent, or Post-MVP feature was implemented.
scope_notes: MVP 阶段 Review Center 不实现完整 Bad Case Center UI
MVP 阶段可以预留 bad_case_candidate 概念，但不开发完整 Bad Case 流程
实际 Bad Case 创建、筛选、根因分析、修复方案和回归评测在 Phase 14 完成

phases.name: Report Center 控制表与异常清单导出

tasks.title: 实现 ReportService 和 xlsx 导出
实现报告预览、生成状态和下载入口
创建 control_table_rows 和 reports 表
实现报告生成、列表和下载 API
测试 xlsx sheets、异常清单、证据索引和报告记录

acceptance_criteria: 可导出 xlsx
xlsx 包含 Summary、Procurement Control Table、Exceptions、Evidence Index、Field Corrections、Rule Definitions
异常清单不隐藏失败规则
证据索引包含文件、页码、来源文本

phases.name: MVP 测试、演示数据、README 和 Docker 交付

tasks.title: 清理 MVP API 响应和错误处理
打磨 MVP 演示路径和空状态
创建 model_invocations 表并验证 migrations
运行规则、API、导出和 E2E demo smoke tests
补齐 README、API 草稿和 demo 说明
验证 Docker Compose 一键启动

acceptance_criteria: 新环境可以按 README 启动
采购穿行 MVP 能从任务创建跑到报告导出
不包含真实密钥和真实敏感数据
测试命令可运行
Phase 10 完成后才允许启动 Post-MVP

phases.name: RAG 四库扩展

tasks.title: 实现 RagService、chunking、embedding、retrieval 和 citation
实现 Knowledge Center 和 citation 展示
创建 rag_documents、rag_chunks 并启用 pgvector
实现 RAG 文档入库、索引、查询和 chunk API
测试 chunking、metadata filter、no-answer 和 citation schema

acceptance_criteria: 四库可分别入库和检索
workpaper 与公开知识库隔离
回答包含 citations
检索不到依据时返回证据不足

phases.name: Rule Center 规则版本化与参数配置

tasks.title: 扩展 RuleEngineService 参数加载和版本追踪
实现 Rule Center 列表、详情、参数编辑和测试入口
完善 audit_rules parameters、version、enabled 和审计日志
实现 rules CRUD 和 evaluate API
测试启用禁用、参数变更、版本写入和审计日志

acceptance_criteria: 规则可启用和禁用
规则参数可配置
规则版本可追踪
规则结果可复现

phases.name: Agent Workflow 状态机与工具调用

tasks.title: 实现 AgentService、状态机、工具白名单和重试
实现 AgentStateTimeline 和失败重试入口
创建 agent_runs 和 agent_steps 表
实现 agent runs、steps 和 retry API
测试状态合法性、重试、人工复核路由和 Rule Engine 约束

acceptance_criteria: Agent 可从上传推进到报告生成
每一步有状态、输入引用、输出引用和耗时
失败步骤可重试
Agent 不能自动确认高风险异常
Agent 不能绕过 Rule Engine 直接生成 pass/fail
Agent 不能在无 citation 时生成依据性结论

phases.name: Bad Case Center 与 Evaluation Center

tasks.title: 实现 BadCaseService 和 EvaluationService
实现 Bad Case Center 和 Evaluation Center
创建 bad_cases 和 evaluation_results 表
实现 bad case 和 evaluation API
测试 Bad Case CRUD、规则评测、字段 expected 对比和回归评测

acceptance_criteria: 能创建和筛选 Bad Case
每个 Bad Case 有输入、输出、期望、根因、修复方案
评测结果记录指标和失败样例
Bad Case 能进入回归评测

phases.name: 销售穿行扩展

tasks.title: 定义销售 doc_type、Schema、归集和规则
支持 sales 场景字段、规则、复核和报告展示
复用现有表并支持 sales scenario
复用现有 API 并增加 sales 参数校验
添加销售分类、抽取、规则和导出测试

acceptance_criteria: 至少一组销售穿行样例端到端跑通
销售异常能进入 Review Center
销售报告可导出
不影响采购 MVP

phases.name: 函证模块扩展

tasks.title: 定义函证 Schema、抽取和差异比对规则
支持 confirmation 场景字段、差异复核和报告
优先复用现有表支持函证场景
复用文档、抽取、规则、复核和报告 API
添加函证字段、日期、金额和差异调节测试

acceptance_criteria: 能抽取函证核心字段
能比对账面金额、回函金额和差异金额
差异样例进入 Review Center
可导出函证差异清单

phases.name: 访谈模块扩展

tasks.title: 定义访谈 Schema、关键回答抽取和差异规则
支持访谈长文本、关键回答和复核展示
优先复用现有表支持访谈场景
复用 OCR、抽取、规则和复核 API
添加访谈字段、来源证据、缺签字和差异测试

acceptance_criteria: 能抽取访谈核心字段
能识别提及金额、主体、关键回答
缺签字、日期异常和底稿差异进入 Review Center

phases.name: 合同审核模块扩展

tasks.title: 定义合同字段和条款 Schema、抽取和规则
支持条款展示、来源片段和风险复核
优先复用 extracted_fields 和 JSONB 条款结构
复用文档处理、抽取、规则、复核和报告 API
添加基础字段、缺失条款、特殊条款和 evidence 测试

acceptance_criteria: 能抽取合同基础字段和关键条款
能识别缺失条款和特殊条款
条款风险能进入 Review Center
报告包含条款证据

phases.name: RBAC、审计、安全、工程化完善

tasks.title: 实现用户、角色、权限、审计和日志脱敏
实现登录页、Admin Center 和权限控制 UI
创建 users、roles、user_roles 并回填外键
实现 Auth、User、Role、Audit Log API
测试登录、权限拒绝、只读限制、日志脱敏和上传安全
评估并按需引入异步任务工程化

acceptance_criteria: 角色权限能限制关键操作
字段修正、规则修改、报告导出有审计日志
API Key 和 .env 不提交
上传、OCR 中间文件、报告不进入 Git
日志不输出完整敏感底稿

phases.name: 最终验收、文档整理、作品集展示材料

tasks.title: 清理 API、确认错误处理和 migration 可复现
整理演示路径、截图、空状态和基础响应式
输出数据库结构文档并确认 demo 数据安全
输出 API reference 并确认接口一致
运行完整 pytest、E2E demo、Post-MVP smoke 和安全 checklist
整理 README、架构、API、数据库、规则、RAG、Agent、Review、Evaluation 和作品集材料

acceptance_criteria: README 可指导新环境启动
docs 覆盖架构、API、数据库、Rule Engine、RAG、Agent、Review、Evaluation、安全
演示材料不夸大商业落地或真实客户使用
作品集材料清楚说明使用模拟或公开数据
最终验收 checklist 全部完成
